series_metadata.series_description: The Budget Backup Materials contain the budgets and payroll worksheets used by BWC divisions for the preparation of the BWC budgets produced on an annual and biennium basis.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: current fiscal year and two prior fiscal years in Budget Unit, provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: current fiscal year and two prior fiscal years on I: Drive in Budget Unit folder, provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved
